name: Poly Macro Oscillator 2
description: A polysynth where each voice is essentially a Plaits (the open source Plaits module by Émilie Gillet). The display shows the notes being played by the various voices. Note that Plaits voices never really end – in theory they decay forever. As on the original Plaits, there are two outputs, 'Main' and 'Aux'. If you select the same bus for both outputs they are mixed.
gui_description: The display shows the notes being played by the various voices. Note that Plaits voices never really end – in theory they decay forever.

input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the level input.
